ast.name: error
ast.source: [MultimuseObsidian] Error fetching user ID from API key:
ast.target: [MultimuseObsidian] 从API密钥获取用户ID时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to get user ID from API key, skipping thread tracking update
ast.target: 从API密钥获取用户ID失败，跳过线程跟踪更新

ast.name: log
ast.source: [MultimuseObsidian] Skipping Base integration for .base file - use Base plugin UI to add records
ast.target: [MultimuseObsidian] 跳过.base文件的Base集成 - 请使用Base插件UI添加记录

ast.name: log
ast.source: [MultimuseObsidian] selectSceneLocation: User cancelled or no selection

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically check Discord threads for new replies
ast.target: 自动检查Discord线程是否有新回复

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often to check for new replies

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 包含场景文件的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to your Obsidian Base file (e.g., "RP Scenes/Roleplay Tracker.base" or "RP Scenes/Tracker.md"). Leave empty and use **Initialize workspace** below to create `<Scenes Folder>/Roleplay Tracker.base`.
ast.target: 您的Obsidian Base文件路径（例如，\"RP Scenes/Roleplay Tracker.base\"或\"RP Scenes/Tracker.md\"）。留空并使用下方的**初始化工作区**来创建`<Scenes Folder>/Roleplay Tracker.base`。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create your scenes folder and tracker base from the paths above (or use **Initialize MultiMuse workspace** in the command palette).
ast.target: 根据上述路径创建您的场景文件夹和跟踪器Base（或使用命令面板中的**初始化MultiMuse工作区**）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically add "Is Active?" property to new scene files (defaults to true)
ast.target: 自动向新场景文件添加\"Is Active?\"属性（默认为true）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Multimuse API key for authentication. Generate one using /api generate in Discord DMs with the bot. Your user ID will be automatically detected from the API key.
ast.target: 您的Multimuse API密钥，用于身份验证。在Discord私信中使用/api generate生成。您的用户ID将自动从API密钥中检测。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manually sync muse names from bot API
ast.target: 从机器人API手动同步缪斯名称

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open a scene note (with Link in frontmatter) and try again.
ast.target: 请打开一个场景笔记（前置元数据中包含Link）并重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This feature requires a markdown view.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: API key must be configured in settings.
ast.target: 必须在设置中配置API密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to get user ID from API key. Please check your API key in settings.
ast.target: 从API密钥获取用户ID失败。请在设置中检查您的API密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to fetch muses from bot API. Check your API URL and connection.
ast.target: 从机器人API获取缪斯失败。请检查您的API URL和连接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No muses found. Make sure you have muses created in Discord.
ast.target: 未找到缪斯。请确保您在Discord中创建了缪斯。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Scene created but failed to track with bot: Authentication failed. Check your API key.
ast.target: 场景已创建，但未能通过机器人跟踪：身份验证失败。请检查您的API密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to fetch tracked threads from bot.
ast.target: 从机器人获取跟踪线程失败。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error syncing from tracker. Check console for details.
ast.target: 从跟踪器同步时出错。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Set Scenes Folder in Multimuse Tracker settings first.
ast.target: 请先在Multimuse Tracker设置中设置场景文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Obsidian Base Path must end in .base or .md, or leave it empty to create Roleplay Tracker.base under your scenes folder.
ast.target: Obsidian Base路径必须以.base或.md结尾，或留空以在场景文件夹下创建Roleplay Tracker.base。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No frontmatter. Add a Link property (Discord thread URL) to this note.
ast.target: 没有前置元数据。请为此笔记添加Link属性（Discord线程URL）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Link property. Add the Discord thread URL to frontmatter to use @ mentions.
ast.target: 没有Link属性。请将Discord线程URL添加到前置元数据以使用@提及。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Link is not a valid Discord channel URL (could not get server ID).
ast.target: Link不是有效的Discord频道URL（无法获取服务器ID）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: API key required in plugin settings to fetch server members.
ast.target: 需要在插件设置中提供API密钥以获取服务器成员。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not load server members. Check API and that the bot is in the server.
ast.target: 无法加载服务器成员。请检查API以及机器人是否在服务器中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to fetch server members. Check connection and API key.
ast.target: 获取服务器成员失败。请检查连接和API密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No members returned for this server. Bot may need Server Members intent.
ast.target: 此服务器未返回成员。机器人可能需要服务器成员意图。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No text selected. Please select text to send as muse.
ast.target: 未选择文本。请选择要以缪斯身份发送的文本。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: File does not have frontmatter. Please add Link and Characters properties.
ast.target: 文件没有前置元数据。请添加Link和Characters属性。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Link property found in frontmatter. Please add a Discord thread URL.
ast.target: 在前置元数据中未找到Link属性。请添加Discord线程URL。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Characters property found in frontmatter. Please add at least one character name.
ast.target: 在前置元数据中未找到“角色”属性。请至少添加一个角色名称。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid Discord URL format in Link property.
ast.target: 链接属性中的Discord URL格式无效。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to get user ID from API key. Please check your API key.
ast.target: 无法从API密钥获取用户ID。请检查您的API密钥。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose where to create the scene file:
ast.target: 选择创建场景文件的位置：

ast.name: text
ast.source: This plugin queries the Multimuse API to check if your scene files match tracked threads and updates the "Replied?" and "Participants" fields.
ast.target: 此插件查询Multimuse API，以检查您的场景文件是否与已追踪的线程匹配，并更新“已回复？”和“参与者”字段。

ast.name: text
ast.source: • Scenes are matched by Link (thread_id) and Characters properties
ast.target: • 场景通过链接（thread_id）和角色属性进行匹配

ast.name: text
ast.source: • If scene matches a tracked thread: Updates Replied? only (true = you replied, false = need to reply). Participants is always editable in frontmatter.
ast.target: • 如果场景匹配已追踪的线程：仅更新“已回复？”（true = 您已回复，false = 需要回复）。参与者始终可在前置元数据中编辑。

ast.name: text
ast.source: • If scene does not match: No updates (scene is not tracked)
ast.target: • 如果场景不匹配：不进行更新（场景未被追踪）

ast.name: text
ast.source: • Make sure your scene files have a "Link" field (Discord thread URL) and "Characters" field (array) in frontmatter
ast.target: • 确保您的场景文件在前置元数据中有一个“链接”字段（Discord线程URL）和“角色”字段（数组）

ast.name: text
ast.source: • Uses Multimuse API - requires an API key for authentication
ast.target: • 使用Multimuse API - 需要API密钥进行身份验证

ast.name: text
ast.source: • Generate an API key using /api generate in Discord DMs with the bot
ast.target: • 在Discord私信中向机器人发送 /api generate 以生成API密钥

ast.name: text
ast.source: • Scenes are auto-detected when queried - no manual registration needed
ast.target: • 查询时场景会自动检测 - 无需手动注册
